issues.message: normalizeRequirementName() only trims whitespace — .toLowerCase() applied separately for case-insensitive matching.
Path resolution path.resolve(changeDir, ../../specs) correctly navigates from openspec/changes/<name>/ to openspec/specs/.

attempts.summary: Code already optimized in prior pass. Four focused loops with distinct semantics, no redundant guards, no consolidation opportunity. Each loop performs a single Set.has() lookup per item — already O(1). No behavior-preserving optimization exists.
